title: CookieClickerV3
description: It's a Cookie Clicker in a graphical user interface with an anti-autoclicker AFK system. There is a top 5 display as well as a cosmetic. The Plugin has MySQL and SQLite support.
body:
# 🍪 CookieClickerV3 - The Ultimate Cookie Clicker Plugin

Transform your Minecraft server into a cookie paradise with CookieClickerV3! This feature-rich plugin brings the addictive cookie clicking experience directly into your Minecraft world.

## ✨ Features

- **🎯 Simple Cookie Clicking Mechanics** - Click your way to cookie domination
- **🔧 Dual Database Support** - Choose between MySQL and SQLite for your storage needs
- **👑 Admin Commands** - Full control over player cookies with add, remove, and set commands
- **📈 Upgrade System** - Enhance your cookie production with various upgrades
- **🏆 Ranking System** - Compete with other players for the top spots
- **🥇 Top 5 Leaderboard** - See who the cookie masters are on your server
- **🎨 Cosmetic Features** - Customize your cookie clicking experience
- **🌍 Multi-Language Support** - Currently supports English and German

## 🚀 Quick Setup

1. Drop the plugin into your `plugins` folder
2. Configure your database settings in the config file
3. Choose your preferred language (English/German)
4. Start clicking those cookies!

## 🎮 Commands

- `/cookie add [player] [amount]` - Add cookies to a player (Admin)
- `/cookie remove [player] [amount]` - Remove cookies from a player (Admin)
- `/cookie set [player] [amount]` - Set a player's cookie count (Admin)
- `/cookie top` - View the top 5 cookie collectors
- `/cookie upgrades` - Access the upgrade shop

## 🔧 Requirements

- Minecraft Server (Spigot/Paper recommended)
- Java 8 or higher
- Optional: MySQL database (SQLite works out of the box)

## 📝 Configuration

The plugin comes with a flexible configuration system allowing you to:
- Choose between MySQL and SQLite databases
- Customize messages and prefixes
- Set up multi-language support
- Configure upgrade costs and benefits

Perfect for survival servers, mini-game networks, or any server looking to add a fun idle game element!

---
## 📬 Support & Ideas

Do you have a suggestion for an update, a cool feature request, or an idea for a completely new plugin? I am always open to feedback and new projects!

Feel free to reach out and add me on Discord:
**Discord:** `DerDerNichtsKann`
